fn build_report(items: &[u32]) -> String {
    let mut output = String::new();
    for item in items {
        let line = format!("item: {}\n", item);
        output.push_str(&line);
    }
    output
}

fn render_csv(rows: &[(&str, &str)]) -> String {
    let mut buf = String::new();
    for (key, val) in rows {
        let row = format!("{},{}\n", key, val);
        buf.push_str(&row);
    }
    buf
}
